name: skeleton
description: A decorative loading placeholder shaped like the content it stands in for. Pulses while content loads, is hidden from screen readers, and respects prefers-reduced-motion. Ships a Skeleton block plus a SkeletonText line stack.

notes: Decorative: aria-hidden so screen readers skip it — the surrounding region owns the loading announcement
The pulse animation is disabled under prefers-reduced-motion
Carries no role or text content, so it never pollutes the accessibility tree

intents: a loading placeholder / shimmer block while content loads
skeleton screen shaped like the real content
grey pulsing placeholder for text, avatars or cards
